DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BRIAN LIVELY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL REQUESTS IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, DIRECTED TO DEFENDANT JACKIE BURNS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2033.280. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST JACKIE BURNS AND HIS ATTORNEYS IN THE AMOUNT OF $390.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM : TOM COHEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BRIAN LIVELY'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT BURNS SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY (FROM INTERROGATORIES, I; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, I AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, I) WITHIN TEN DAYS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST JACKIE BURNS AND HIS ATTORNEYS IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM : TOM COHEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/MJM

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Deft To Respond To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HEATHER M. SWEENEY OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 421-2800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BRIAN LIVELY'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant Burns shall provide verified responses to discovery (From Interrogatories, I; Special Interrogatories, I and Request for Production of Documents, I) within ten days. Sanctions are awarded against Jackie Burns and his attorneys in the amount of $300.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem : Tom Cohen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Ntc Of Motion For Order To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HEATHER M. SWEENEY OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 421-2800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BRIAN LIVELY'S Motion For Order To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanction
is granted. No opposition filed. All requests in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions, Set One, directed to Defendant Jackie Burns are deemed admitted pursuant to CCP section 2033.280. Sanctions are awarded against Jackie Burns and his attorneys in the amount of $390.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem : Tom Cohen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
